episodes.title: Clintons push back as Epstein deposition videos go public
episodes.description: Video depositions of Hillary Clinton and Bill Clinton show tense exchanges with Republicans during questioning by the House Oversight Committee over their past contacts with Jeffrey Epstein. Both denied meaningful ties, with Bill Clinton acknowledging past travel but saying he cut off contact before Epstein’s 2008 guilty plea.

episodes.title: Clintons clash with House panel in Epstein deposition release
episodes.description: The House Oversight Committee has released hours of deposition footage showing former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton answering questions about their past ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Bill Clinton's opening statement in Epstein deposition
episodes.description:
Former Pres. Bill Clinton testified about Jeffery Epstein in an hours-long deposition. Here's his opening statement.

episodes.title: FULL VIDEO: Trump deposition in E. Jean Carroll rape trial
episodes.description:
The full video of a deposition given by former president Donald Trump as part of his civil rape trial has been released. In the video, Trump calls his accuser, writer E. Jean Carroll a “nut job” and “mentally sick.” At one point, he also mistakes Carroll for his ex-wife Marla Maples in a photo.
